parameters.query:
WITH upserted AS (
  INSERT INTO players (external_id, display_name, position, team_id, sport, jersey_number)
  SELECT
    $3::integer,
    $4,
    $7,
    (SELECT id FROM teams WHERE external_id = $2::integer),
    'Football',
    $5::integer
  WHERE $3::integer IS NOT NULL
  ON CONFLICT (external_id) DO UPDATE SET
    display_name  = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.display_name,  players.display_name),
    position      = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.position,      players.position),
    team_id       = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.team_id,       players.team_id),
    jersey_number = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.jersey_number, players.jersey_number)
  RETURNING id
)
INSERT INTO lineups
  (match_id, team_id, player_id, player_name, jersey_number, status, position, is_substituted, number_of_goals, has_yellow_card, has_red_card, formation)
SELECT
  $1::integer,
  (SELECT id FROM teams WHERE external_id = $2::integer),
  (SELECT id FROM upserted
   UNION ALL
   SELECT id FROM players WHERE external_id = $3::integer
   LIMIT 1),
  $4,
  $5::integer,
  $6,
  $7,
  $8::boolean,
  0, false, false,
  $9
SELECT external_id FROM matches WHERE id = $1
